data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: A splendid taste bud journey in Fenjiu Museum
data.description: On April 3, 2026, in Beijing, it was reported that at the Panama-Pacific International Exposition in 1915, a jar of Fenjiu from the Yiquanyong Distillery in Shanxi was opened, emitting a refreshing aroma that filled the exhibition venue. This moment marked a significant event in history, highlighting the distillery's exceptional product quality. This showcase of Fenjiu demonstrated its appeal beyond China and showcased its unique flavor profile to a global audience.

data.title: LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. Holds Signing Ceremony to Mark Appointment as an Official Partner of the Japan Sport Association (JSPO)
data.description: Tokyo-based LEIFRAS Co., Ltd. (Nasdaq: LFS), a company focused on youth sports and community involvement, recently conducted a signing event on April 3, 2026 at its Japan headquarters. This event marked a significant milestone for the company as it continues to prioritize initiatives related to sports and community engagement.

These festivities see Chinese individuals traveling back to their hometowns to reunite with their families. data.title: Amazon Slaps War-Driven Logistics Fee For Sellers As Fuel Costs Surge Across US, Canada
data.description: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) will implement a 3.5% surcharge related to fuel and logistics on third-party sellers utilizing its fulfillment services starting April 17. This move follows the surge in oil prices due to the ongoing Iran war, now in its fifth week. The surcharge, applicable to U.S. and Canadian sellers, will be based on fulfillment fees rather than the items' sale prices. Amazon's spokesperson, Ashley Vanicek, mentioned that the surcharge is comparatively lower than those implemented by other major carriers. On average, Fulfilment by Amazon (FBA) shipments will incur an additional cost of about 17 cents per unit, varying based on item size and dimensions. The FBA service, renowned for its efficient picking, packing, and shipping, has seen increased costs in fulfillment and logistics.

data.title: McDonald's Türkiye Introduces 'Archie' for Gamers
data.description: McDonald's Turkey has launched a new innovation targeting online gamers' common problem of being disconnected from games during meal breaks. The "Archie" device, paired with the Pro Gamer Menu, aims to maintain characters active during breaks, preventing interruptions in gaming sessions. This solution caters to gamers' needs and enhances their experience.

data.title: MEXC Integrates USD1 into Full-Spectrum Infrastructure for Global Users
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles, on April 3, 2026, MEXC, a rapidly growing digital asset exchange known for zero-fee trading, revealed plans to enhance the utilization of USD1, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, within its platform. This move is part of a broader strategy to integrate and promote the adoption of USD1 across various aspects of MEXC's ecosystem.

data.title: Enry’s Island Unveils “Enry’s Island Adventures”: Venture Capital Becomes a Videogame and Launches the “Strap” Movement on Kickstarter
data.description: Enry’s Island SpA, the world's first publicly traded Venture Builder (WBAG: EIOS), has revealed plans for the upcoming Kickstarter launch of Enry’s Island Adventures (EIA). This game, developed by Enry’s Island Adventures LLC in New York, aims to democratize venture capital for younger audiences. The game transforms the startup creation process into an interactive social gaming experience. After three years of research and development, EIA is poised to enter the market.
